episodes.title: Petition to limit Scientology development fails
episodes.description: Clearwater City Council rejected a petition to prevent the Church of Scientology from building L. Ron Hubbard Hall downtown. It could pave the way for construction.

episodes.title: Trump fires Attorney General Pam Bondi
episodes.description: The announcement follows months of scrutiny over the Justice Department’s handling of files related to Jeffrey Epstein’s sex trafficking investigation.

episodes.title: Social media users speculate over empty Clearwater motel and its ties to the Church of Scientology
episodes.description: Social media users have had videos showing bunkbeds in an empty motel in Clearwater popping into their feeds. Many are saying it's the Church of Scientology.

episodes.title: Church of Scientology withdraws request to buy land from Clearwater
episodes.description: A letter obtained by 10 Tampa Bay details the decision behind the church requesting the item be pulled from the Clearwater City Council's agenda.

episodes.title: Church of Scientology wants to buy portion of Clearwater road
episodes.description: The church said it plans to use the space for a performance hall and plaza.

episodes.title: Mike Rinder, outspoken critic of Scientology, dies at 69
episodes.description: For decades, Rinder was a top staffer inside the Church of Scientology.
